nasb.text: For you tolerate it if anyone enslaves you, anyone devours you, anyone takes advantage of you, anyone exalts himself, anyone hits you in the face.

esv.text: For you bear it if someone makes slaves of you, or devours you, or takes advantage of you, or puts on airs, or strikes you in the face.

cnv.text: 如果有人奴役你們，侵吞、榨取你們，向你們趾高氣揚，打你們的臉，你們就容忍吧！

ccb.text: 就算有人奴役、剥削、利用、侮辱你们，打你们耳光，你们都能逆来顺受！

csbs.text: 实际上，就算有人奴役你们，或侵吞你们，或榨取你们，或压制你们，或打你们的脸，你们也能容忍。
